items.title: Superintendent Murphy communication on FY27 Cambridge Public Schools operating budget priorities
items.summary: Superintendent David Murphy submitted a communication to the joint Council/School Committee roundtable outlining the priorities driving the FY27 operating budget for the Cambridge Public Schools. The document is the basis for a working discussion between the City Council and School Committee about CPS budget direction for the upcoming fiscal year. No vote is scheduled at this working meeting.
items.body:
A COMMUNICATION HAS BEEN RECEIVED FROM DAVID MURPHY, SUPERINTENDENT CAMBRIDGE PUBLIC SCHOOLS. REGARDING PRIORITIES DRIVING OUR FY27 OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE CAMBRIDGE PUBLIC SCHOOLS
COF 2026-15

rationale.doc.kind:COF: Section VII. COMMUNICATIONS FROM OTHER CITY OFFICERS
rationale.doc.item_id:cof-2026-15: item id printed in agenda: COF 2026-15
rationale.geo.scope:citywide: CPS operating budget applies to the whole district, no specific school named
rationale.household.kids:k12: operating budget for Cambridge Public Schools (K-12 system)
rationale.household.kids:under_5: CPS operating budget includes Junior Kindergarten/preschool programs serving under-5
rationale.topic.area:schools: joint working meeting on CPS budget priorities
rationale.fiscal.kind:appropriation: subject is the FY27 OPERATING BUDGET for Cambridge Public Schools
